message:
Running command: # GREAT RESULTS!
# DRT completed: 22 violations remaining after 40 iterations
# Runtime: 1h46min, Peak RAM: 5GB

# Now track the flow progress - it's past DRT!
sleep 300
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "FLOW ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -10
tail -10 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
